content_movie_shape_check.name: content_movie_shape_check
content_movie_shape_check.value: ("content"."kind" <> 'movie') OR ("content"."tmdb_movie_id" IS NOT NULL AND "content"."tmdb_show_id" IS NULL AND "content"."tmdb_season_number" IS NULL)

content_season_shape_check.name: content_season_shape_check
content_season_shape_check.value: ("content"."kind" <> 'season') OR ("content"."tmdb_show_id" IS NOT NULL AND "content"."tmdb_season_number" IS NOT NULL AND "content"."tmdb_movie_id" IS NULL)
